steps.t: The Even-rills lie in Evendim, far to the west of the North Downs, on the northern end of Lake Evendim. Handarod has asked you to scout the area aroun…
The Eave-mere lies in Evendim, far to the west of the North Downs, on the western side of Lake Evendim. Handarod has asked you to scout the Eave-mere,…
Tollobel lies in Evendim, far to the west of the North Downs, in the south-west reaches of Lake Evendim. Handarod has asked you to scout the island of…
Handarod is at Esteldín in the North Downs, far to the east of Evendim. You should report to Handarod and tell him what you have found along the shore…
